checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export localStorage.jones_fastlane_save to disk. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Restart Persona A from onboarding in `phase11-safe-grinder`, redo Week 1 from first principles, treat `Work Shift x3` as the default Safe Grinder baseline whenever time and hunger allow, write the corrected authoritative `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-01.md`, and export a new durable checkpoint immediately after the week closes.

last_run.summary: The restarted Persona A Week 1 control surface was invalidated after review because Safe Grinder ended the week after one `Sanitation-T3` shift despite a deterministic three-shift baseline still being available. The active workflow now requires a Week 1 redo from onboarding before any Week 2 continuation.
